title: MorshLive / KoraZero — Cloudflare API token scopes
description: Create ONE token with these permissions. Use for GitHub Actions (CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN), local .env, and Cursor cloud agents. Avoid IP restrictions unless you know all deploy egress IPs.

token_preferences.suggested_name: MorshLive full deploy — GitHub + Cursor + local

restrictions.ip_filter: none (recommended — agents and GitHub use dynamic IPs)
restrictions.ttl: no expiry or 1 year+ with calendar reminder
restrictions.account_resources: Include — All accounts (or your single account)
restrictions.zone_resources: Include — korazero.com (and any future zones on this account)

dashboard_quick_path.then_add: See permissions.recommended_all_in_one below — template alone is not enough for korazero.com routes + secrets + Pages legacy

required_now.name: Workers Scripts Edit
required_now.purpose: wrangler deploy, upload worker.js + static assets, wrangler secret put
required_now.why_it_failed_before: Token could read scripts (GET 200) but lacked Edit — verify-deploy-token.js and deploy both need this

required_now.name: Account Settings Read
required_now.purpose: Wrangler account lookup and token verification

recommended_all_in_one.name: Workers KV Storage Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Future edge cache / rate-limit counters without burning request quota

recommended_all_in_one.name: Workers R2 Storage Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Future VOD clips, meme archives, highlight blobs

recommended_all_in_one.name: Workers Tail Read
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: npx wrangler tail morshlive — live debug in production

recommended_all_in_one.name: Cloudflare Pages Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Legacy korazero Pages project, npx wrangler pages deploy, docs/CLOUDFLARE.md Option B/C

recommended_all_in_one.name: Cloudflare Pages Read
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Inspect Pages deployments without edit accidents

recommended_all_in_one.name: Workers Observability Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Workers Logs / observability dashboards when enabled

recommended_all_in_one.name: D1 Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Future match DB, user prefs, analytics at edge

recommended_all_in_one.name: Secrets Store Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Account-level secrets (if migrating off wrangler secret put)

recommended_all_in_one.name: DNS Read
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Verify korazero.com points to Worker not stale Pages

recommended_all_in_one.name: DNS Edit
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Automate moving custom domain from Pages → Worker

recommended_all_in_one.name: SSL and Certificates Read
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Debug HTTPS / cert issues after domain moves

recommended_all_in_one.name: Zone Settings Read
recommended_all_in_one.purpose: Cache level, security level, bot fight mode audits

worker_secrets_not_api_token.note: These are Worker runtime secrets (wrangler secret put), NOT Cloudflare API token scopes

secrets.name: SIR_PLAYER
secrets.purpose: siir-tv shootny player URL (production only, not in git)

secrets.name: SIR_KEY
secrets.purpose: siir-tv shootny key (production only, not in git)

required.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
required.value: same token as below with full scopes

optional.name: CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN5
optional.value: alias — deploy.yml checks this if API_TOKEN missing

optional.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
optional.value: only if baking highlights in CI — runtime uses Worker secret

not_cloudflare: GITHUB billing must be active — Actions failed with 'account is locked due to a billing issue' (deploy blocker separate from token scopes)

create_token_checklist: 3. Permissions: add every item in permissions.recommended_all_in_one (account + zone + user)
4. Zone resources: korazero.com (or All zones on account)
9. Set GitHub secret CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN + local .env CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
10. Run: node scripts/verify-deploy-token.js — must print OK
11. Run: bash scripts/deploy-cloudflare.sh — must complete wrangler deploy

minimal_if_paranoid.description: Smallest token that fixes today's deploy failure only — add future scopes before you need them
